name: qa_manager_create_error_report_using_saved_rules
desc: QA Manager workflow: run Error Manager rule engine (optionally with a saved rule set) → optionally capture screenshots → export a full error report in any combination of excel/xml/html/pdf/word. Single-call replacement for manually chaining ErrorManagerRunErrorCheckCommand + CaptureAllClashResultImages + ExportClashResults*.

parameters.name: rule_set
parameters.description: Optional rule set name to run (default: every discoverable rule).

parameters.name: formats
parameters.description: Comma-separated formats: excel, xml, html, pdf, word. Default: excel,xml,html.

keywords: create error report using saved rules
